meta.title: Clean History - Kyaw Kyar
meta.description: Every vehicle listed by Kyaw Kyar is screened for ownership clarity, legal status, and unacceptable modifications before it is offered for sale.

hero.alt: Vehicle inspection report illustration with verified history checklist
hero.title: History Checked.
hero.description: Every vehicle is screened for ownership clarity, legal status, and trustworthiness before it enters the showroom.
hero.descriptionLine2: If ownership, legality, or record integrity cannot be confirmed, the vehicle does not move forward.
hero.policy: A Kyaw Kyar listing begins only after the record is reviewed and cleared through our internal verification standard.

trust.sectionDescription: Every approved vehicle must pass these ownership, legal, and buyer-confidence checks first.

verifiedDoc.title: Ownership Verified
verifiedDoc.description: Registration and ownership records are reviewed before approval.

zeroRisk.title: Legal Status Cleared
zeroRisk.description: If the status is unclear, the vehicle is rejected from listing.

buyerProtection.title: Buyer Confidence Protected
buyerProtection.description: The result is a cleaner purchase decision and stronger resale trust.

rejection.sectionDescription: We reject vehicles the moment the record is unclear. That keeps buyer confidence high and protects the reputation of every car that stays in our inventory.

noOwnerBook.title: Copied or Unclear Ownership Records
noOwnerBook.description: If the ownership trail is incomplete, copied, or cannot be verified, the vehicle is stopped before listing.

noIllegalMods.title: Unapproved Structural Modifications
noIllegalMods.description: Undocumented engine swaps, chassis changes, or illegal alterations are not accepted into inventory.

noLegalExposure.title: Active Legal or Registration Exposure
noLegalExposure.description: Vehicles connected to disputes, debt, ownership conflict, or registration irregularities do not proceed.

cta.title: Trust Begins With Screening
cta.finalTitle: Clean history is part of our screening process, not a claim.
cta.description: We remove uncertainty before the vehicle is presented to the buyer.
